target_skill.name: grove
target_skill.description: Grove ops — "save this idea", "what's in grove", "log this decision", "what did we decide", "project status", recent activity. Not for to-dos (→ add-to-do) or scoring (→ idea-scout, idea-vault).

competing_skills.name: add-to-do
competing_skills.description: Task capture and triage — "add to do", "remind me to", "show my to-dos", "done with X", "drop X". Also project feature ideas. Not standalone ideas (→ idea-scout) or scoring (→ idea-vault).

competing_skills.name: idea-vault
competing_skills.description: Browse stored ideas — "show my ideas", "vault", "compare ideas", "what should I build next". Not for scouting (→ idea-scout), capture (→ grove), or calibration (→ review-panel).

competing_skills.name: idea-scout
competing_skills.description: Score raw standalone ideas — "scout this", "is this viable". Auto-fires. Not project features (→ add-to-do), building (→ architect), saving (→ idea-vault), batch (→ brainstorm-engine).

competing_skills.name: chat-status
competing_skills.description: Mid-session checkpoint — "where are we", "status update", "what's next", summaries, topic shifts. Use proactively. Not session start (→ session-start) or close (→ chat-archive).

competing_skills.name: session-start
competing_skills.description: Session onboarding — "work on [project]", "continue [project]", "keep working on X", or pasting a handoff. Loads handoff + PLAN. Not for mid-session (→ chat-status) or archive (→ chat-archive).

positive_cases: Grove this idea — a CLI that turns my screenshots folder into a searchable archive, ran into it twice this week
What did we decide about the supabase keepalive thing? I remember we went back and forth on it
Log this decision: we're sticking with Vercel hobby tier and consolidating routes instead of upgrading
what's in grove right now? feel like I've been dumping stuff in there all month
Give me a project status rundown — which of my projects are actually moving
negative_cases: remind me to renew the apple developer membership before July
add to do: swap the og-image on the medicaid site
show my ideas — which ones got greenlit?
is this viable: a paid newsletter that summarizes county zoning meetings
where are we on the earmark build? feels like we covered a lot today
compare my top three ideas and tell me what to build next
